use_cases: Landing page hero sections with engaging video backgrounds
Product showcases that reveal video content as users scroll
Portfolio or media sites requiring cinematic scroll effects
SaaS landing pages with scroll-driven video scaling animations
ai_summary: A cinematic hero component featuring a video that scales dynamically from a small starting size (default 25%) to full size as the user scrolls through a tall container. Uses Framer Motion for smooth animations and respects reduced motion preferences. The sticky video container creates an immersive scroll experience perfect for landing pages and product showcases.
